scripts.db:migrate: prisma db execute --schema prisma/schema.prisma --file prisma/migrations/0001_phase3_auth/migration.sql && prisma db execute --schema prisma/schema.prisma --file prisma/migrations/0002_registration_email_codes/migration.sql && prisma db execute --schema prisma/schema.prisma --file prisma/migrations/0003_catalog/migration.sql
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:migrate && prisma db seed
